name: latex-poster-pipeline
description: End-to-end LaTeX poster generation pipeline: ingest content, draft template, compile, and finalize export.

inputs.analysis_report_path: Absolute path to the markdown analysis report.

hard_constraints: Do not proceed past ingestion if analysis_report.md or figures_dir is missing.
Always run latex_compile at least twice to ensure references resolve correctly.
If a LaTeX compilation throws a Fatal Error, attempt fix twice, then halt if unresolvable.

steps.name: drafting
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 2 (latex-draft). Map markdown content from {{analysis_report_path}} and figures into the Beamer .tex template.

steps.name: compilation
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 3 (latex-compile). Compile the drafted .tex file, run it twice, and fix minor LaTeX errors if any.

steps.name: finalization
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 4 (latex-finalize). Export the final PDF and write success status.
